message:
test: update existing harness and WAL tests for new API surfaces and contract changes

Adapt existing tests to new harness infrastructure:

- corpus_ingest_test: update for FixtureIngestReport return type and
  SLT ingestion API. Add skip-reason validation.
- differential_v2_test: add scenario_id and metadata field assertions.
  Validate DifferentialMetadata schema contract, trace_id determinism,
  and fixture_manifest_hash.
- score_engine_test: adapt for new release threshold policy fields.
- workspace_layering: add oracle_preflight_doctor to allowed module set.
  Validate new conformance fixture file counts.
- bd_2yqp6_2_1: update oracle wiring assertions for new API.
- bd_2yqp6_3_1: update corpus manifest counts for new fixtures (017-021).
- bd_2yqp6_4_1: expand runtime stub inventory for new binaries.
- bd_1r0ha_3: update concurrent e2e for new executor API.
- bd_xfn30_3: update fault injection matrix for new WAL API.

Minor formatting fixes and version string updates across other test files
to maintain consistency.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
